name: Banat
summary: Western ethnographic region with mixed influences, formal dances, and ornate festive attire.

games.name: Braul banatean
games.description: Compact group dance with accented rhythm and rotational figures.

costumes.name: Costum cu poale largi
costumes.description: Layered festive costume featuring pleated skirts and richly decorated aprons.

traditions.name: Ruga satului
traditions.description: Village patron celebration combining liturgy, feast, and traditional dance.
